steps.sql:
SELECT T2.A, T2.B, T1.D, T1.E, T1.F, T1.G, T1.H, MAX(T1.C), '^'
      FROM T1, T2
     WHERE T1.B = T2.B
       AND T1.C = T2.C
     GROUP BY T2.A, T2.B, T1.D, T1.E, T1.F, T1.G, T1.H
     ORDER BY +max(t1.c);

SELECT T2.A, T2.B, T1.D, T1.E, T1.F, T1.G, T1.H, MAX(T1.C), '^'
     FROM T1, T2
    WHERE T1.B = T2.B
      AND T1.C = T2.C
    GROUP BY T2.A, T2.B, T1.F, T1.D, T1.E, T1.G, T1.H
    ORDER BY +max(t1.c);
